products.name: Jafar's Throne Room // Secret Passage - Battleground (Oversized)

metadata.rulesText:
Difficulty: Easy
Jafar's characters enter play exerted.
Illumineer Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Chosen Character gets Resist +1 until end of turn.
2 — Another chosen Illumineer gains 2 lore.
3 — Deal 5 damage to the chosen character or location

Secret Passage
Difficulty: Normal
Jafar starts the game with Ink Moat in play.
Illumineer Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.
2 — Chosen Illumineer draws a card.
3 — Deal 5 damage to chosen location.

products.name: The Crown Chamber // Full Alert - Battleground (Oversized)

metadata.rulesText:
Difficulty: Hard
Jafar begins the game with Ink Moat in play.
Jafar's locations gain Resist +1.
Illumineer Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Chosen Character gets +2 Strength this turn.
2 — Each Illumineer pays 1 ink less for the next character they play this turn.
3 — Each Illumineer puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

Full Alert
Difficulty: Extreme
Jafar starts the game with Ink Moat in play.
Jafar's locations gain Evasive and get +1 Lore.
Illumineer Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
4 — Chosen character gains Evasive this turn.

metadata.rulesText:
At the end of their turn, whoever has this item gains 2 lore.
If this item would leave play for any reason, Jafar steals it instead.
When Jafar has this item, he can't lose the game.

Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

metadata.rulesText:

[Mark of Power] Whenever you ready this character, gain 1 lore for each other undamaged character you have in play.
[Bolt Stare] [Exert] — Banish chosen Illusion character.
